items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior regarding 'Deposit collection vs full payment'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific outcomes or results from the simulation of this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the expected result was achieved. The linked use cases and prior step evidence do not address the specific requirements of this exploratory step, leading to an inconclusive status.
